summary: Completed issue 095 locally. SpecBridge now emits a deterministic `next_contract_seed` block from `standard-loop-orchestrate` so the Standard Loop plan directly names the next governed contract paths, branch suggestion, issue reference, required evidence paths, suggested local commands, and completion gates without launching Claude Code, Antigravity, GitHub calls, dependency installation, workflow changes, or deployment.

It does not launch Claude Code, launch Antigravity, call GitHub, install dependencies, change workflows, access secrets, touch production, change auth or billing, change databases, weaken CI/CD security, or deploy.
